...Bhriogais Chearr/The Wrong Trousers. Tha briogais-teicneo 's loidsear ùr gus trioblaid uabhasach adhbharachadh do Wallace 's Gromit. A pair of techno-trousers and a new lodger cause untold trouble.

...Qualifier - Scotland v Luxembourg. Live international football as Scotland women's team take on Luxembourg in a World Cup qualifier.
4/8. Sann air dealachach, trèigsinn agus eilthireach a tha am program a cuir an aghaidh an t-seachdain seo. Alyth MacCormick explores the themes of parting, leaving home and exile.
2/8. Ramsay escapes Glasgow for an action-packed weekend in Speyside. Ramsay a'teiche a Glaschu airson dà latha luma làn ann an Srath Spè.

programmes.show_description: Live Serie A football action as Bologna host Hellas Verona. All the coverage with Alex O' Henley, while commentary comes from Allan MacLeod.
